subcodes.first_line: O scion of that noble soul! Thy detailed letter was considered, and the grievous events in Iran were noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیل الرجل الجلیل نامه مفصل شما ملاحظه گردید و از حوادث الیمه ایران
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @non-participation in politics, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
